General.Name: Garda Property Group
General.Description: Garda Property Group (ASX: GDF) (Garda) is an industrial real estate investor, developer and active manager with investments predominately in Brisbane. As at 30 June 2024, Garda had $509 million of investments between industrial properties (83%) and commercial office properties (17%).
